comment: "I enjoyed  learning how intraoperative imaging directly affects surgical outcomes especially in procedures like ankle fracture fixation. The use of the Mortise View to assess joint alignment and implant positioning was fascinating. I also appreciated the practical knowledge on positioning the patient and the C-Arm, which are vital skills in the theatre setting. These insights will definitely help me support the surgical team more effectively during orthopedic cases."

"The most interesting aspect of this course was learning how to use the C-Arm for real-time imaging during ankle fracture surgeries. I found it fascinating to see how intraoperative imaging improves the accuracy of fracture reduction and implant placement. Understanding the step-by-step positioning of the C-Arm and safety measures for both the patient and surgical team was particularly engaging."
"Amazing course. I was able to appreciate the importance of intraoperative imaging in the surgical management of ankle fractures. I am going to ensure I request for one in my area of operation."
"The imaging showing the radiographs and the labelling made it clear and easy to understand why certain views are used and what proper alignment should look like."
"This is an excellent and well put together course."
